diff: Pending changes may be cancelled for the following reasons: misalignment or conflict with the Sky Atlas or Spark Artifact; excessive or unacceptable risk, as identified by the Sky Core Council or Spark Risk Council; emergency situations, as defined in the Sky Atlas in [A.1.8 - Emergency Response System](1d940c6d-02ce-4c17-8057-cef13c1cc7ad); or cancellation requested by the Curator.
description: This proposal is submitted by Phoenix Labs in its role as a nested contributor, as defined in section A.6.1.1.1.2.2.2.2.1.2.1.1.1 of the Spark Artifact. The proposal recommends that Spark governance adopt a Risk Curation Framework, under which certain on-chain activities may be executed by approved external contributors (“Curators”) subject to explicit governance approval, timelock protections, and defined cancellation authorities. The proposed framework is intended to improve operational efficiency and responsiveness in Spark’s risk management processes, while maintaining Spark governance’s…

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling

diff: Pending changes may be cancelled for the following reasons: misalignment or conflict with the Sky Atlas or Spark Artifact; excessive or unacceptable risk, as identified by the Sky Core Council or Spark Risk Council; emergency situations, as defined in the Sky Atlas in [A.1.
- Emergency Response System](1d940c6d-02ce-4c17-8057-cef13c1cc7ad); or cancellation requested by the Curator.
